💬 Contact Us
📱 SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT

90 Social Accounts Managed by AI. Yours?

Competitors post 3x a day. You? BerkahKarya manages all your business social platforms — AI content, auto-posting to TikTok/IG/YouTube/Facebook — from $99/month.

Get Started →View Packages
✓Setup <5 menit
✓Garansi 7 hari
✓Support via Telegram

If your business social media looks like this, you are already behind.

📅

Inconsistent posting — active sometimes, dead for weeks at a time.

⏰

One piece of content takes 2-3 hours. You simply do not have time for that.

📉

Stagnant engagement. Followers do not grow because algorithms demand consistency.

😫

Hiring a social media manager is expensive. Freelancers are inconsistent.

BerkahKarya handles it all with AI that never takes a day off.

🏗️

90-Account Infrastructure

Proven backend already managing 90 active accounts. Ready to scale your business.

🤖

AI Content Generation

AI generates captions, hashtags, and content scripts tailored to your niche.

📤

Multi-Platform Auto-Posting

Schedule and auto-post to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, Threads.

📊

Analytics & Reporting

Weekly performance reports — reach, engagement, follower growth, top content.

#️⃣

Hashtag Optimization

AI researches trending hashtags for each post to maximize reach.

🔄

Content Calendar

Planned 30-day content calendar. No more last-minute posting.

⚡ Cara Kerja

Easy Onboarding, Real Results

1

Onboarding & Brief

We learn your business, target audience, and tone of voice. Setup done in 1 day.

2

AI Content Production

AI team generates brand-matched content. You review & approve before publishing.

3

Post & Monitor

Content published at optimal times. You receive weekly performance reports.

💎 Pilih Paket

Investasi yang Langsung Balik Modal

Mulai kapan saja. Cancel kapan saja. Garansi 7 hari uang kembali.

Starter
$99/month
  • 10 content pieces/month
  • 1 platform (TikTok OR IG)
  • AI captions + hashtags
  • Monthly report
  • 24h response time
Choose Starter
⭐ Paling PopulerGrowth
$165/month
  • 15 content pieces/month
  • 2 platforms (TikTok + IG)
  • AI captions + hashtags
  • Weekly performance report
  • 1 revision per content
  • 30-day content calendar
  • Priority response
Choose Growth
Scale
$330/month
  • 30 content pieces/month
  • 3 platforms (TikTok + IG + YouTube)
  • Premium captions + CTAs
  • Weekly report + analytics
  • Unlimited revisions
  • Dedicated account manager
Choose Scale

🛡️ Semua paket dilengkapi garansi uang kembali 7 hari · Tidak perlu kartu kredit
